info.title: Converio - Jobs API
info.description: Hiring-manager + operator endpoints for job intake. Today: managed-intake submission that fires the JobIntakeWorkflow fire-and-forget. Source of truth for the jobs API contract; backend Pydantic models and frontend TS clients are generated from this file.

post.summary: Submit a managed job intake and fire JobIntakeWorkflow
post.description: Hiring-manager (or operator-on-behalf-of) submits role intake. Creates a Job row with status='intake', then starts JobIntakeWorkflow on the Temporal `converio-queue` with WorkflowIDReusePolicy.REJECT_DUPLICATE. Returns 202 Accepted immediately — the full pipeline (classify -> rubric -> recruiter assignment -> sourcing -> scoring -> review) is multi-day; clients should subscribe via SSE / polling. Rate-limited to 10/hour/company_id.

202.description: Intake accepted. Job row persisted; JobIntakeWorkflow started on Temporal.

403.description: Authenticated user is not seated at the target company and is not an operator.

404.description: Company not found for the supplied `company_id`.

422.description: Request body failed schema validation (e.g. compensation_min > compensation_max).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for this company. Retry after the window resets.

500.description: Internal server error - database or Temporal unavailable.

RemoteOnsite.description: Work location modality for the role.

JobStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a Job. Mirrors the JobStatus enum in app/schemas/enums.py.

JobIntakeRequest.description: Hiring-manager (or operator) intake submission. Classification fields (role_category, seniority, must_have_skills) are intentionally absent — the workflow's classify_role_type activity extracts them.

company_id.description: Target company id. Authenticated user must be seated at this company (or be an operator).

jd_text.description: Full job description body. Used as input to classify_role_type and generate_evaluation_rubric LLM activities.

intake_notes.description: Operator's onboarding-call notes. Fed into both LLM activities (classify + rubric).

remote_onsite.description: Optional explicit work-location modality. If null, the workflow attempts to extract it from JD text.

compensation_max.description: Maximum compensation (USD, annualized). Must be >= compensation_min when both are supplied; enforced at the endpoint.

extra.description: Pass-through bag for forward-compatible fields (e.g. company-supplied rubric hints).

JobIntakeAcceptedResponse.description: 202 response shape for accepted intake submissions.

workflow_id.description: Temporal workflow id (deterministic per job; REJECT_DUPLICATE reuse policy).

status.description: Initial Job status at creation time. Always 'intake' for fresh submissions.

ErrorResponse.description: FastAPI error response. `detail` is either a string (HTTPException) or a list of validation error objects.

BearerAuth.description: Supabase-issued JWT supplied as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Must resolve to a CompanyUser seated at the target company, or to an active Operator.
